name: happy3_loop
note: Princess twirl + curtsy, 20-frame seamless loop. Frames 0-10: one full graceful rotation on tiptoe, arms out like a ballerina (front -> left profile -> back -> right profile -> front). Frames 11-19: princess curtsy. CRITICAL consistency rules: (1) the pleated skirt is SHORT (mini length, hem well above the knees) in EVERY frame — it may flare outward but NEVER gets longer, white crew socks always visible below it; (2) during the curtsy the feet keep ONE FIXED position (close together, one foot tucked directly behind the other ankle) — only the knees bend deeper, the lower body never changes stance. Rotation direction: her face sweeps toward the LEFT side of the image first.
frames: Pose: beginning a graceful princess twirl: standing tall FACING THE VIEWER, heels lifting onto tiptoe, both arms rising outward to the sides with soft elegant ballerina wrists, pleated skirt just beginning to flare, long blonde hair starting to lift, serene closed-eye smile, tiny sparkles around her. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs exactly as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: graceful princess twirl in progress, body rotated an EIGHTH of a turn so her face is in three-quarter view looking toward the LEFT side of the image, on tiptoe, both arms held out to the sides like a ballerina, skirt and lab coat flaring outward, long blonde hair swinging with the turn, serene closed-eye smile, sparkles. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs, do not mirror the character.

Pose: graceful princess twirl in progress, body rotated half-way between a three-quarter view and a full profile — her face turned STRONGLY toward the LEFT edge of the image, definitely NOT facing the viewer, we see mostly the left side of her face and only one eye, on tiptoe, arms out gracefully, her SHORT pleated mini skirt (hem well above her knees, exactly the same short length as the reference) swirling outward with the spin, her white crew socks and legs clearly visible below the skirt hem, hair flowing behind her, serene smile, sparkles.

Pose: graceful princess twirl at a QUARTER turn: full LEFT PROFILE view, her nose pointing exactly at the LEFT edge of the image, standing on tiptoe, both arms held out front and back like a ballerina, her SHORT pleated mini skirt (hem well above her knees, same short length as the reference) swirling with the spin, white crew socks and legs clearly visible below the hem, long blonde hair streaming behind her toward the right side of the image, serene smile, sparkles.

Pose: graceful princess twirl in THREE-QUARTER BACK view: mostly her BACK is visible, her face turned away toward the left edge and barely visible, long blonde hair sweeping across her back, white lab coat seen from behind, her SHORT pleated mini skirt (hem well above the knees, never longer than the reference) swirling outward, white crew socks and legs clearly visible below the hem, on tiptoe, arms out, sparkles around her.

Pose: graceful princess twirl at the HALF turn: FULL BACK view, seen directly from behind, her face NOT visible at all, long blonde hair flowing down her back and swirling with the spin, white lab coat seen from behind, her SHORT pleated lemon-print mini skirt (hem well above the knees, never longer than the reference) swirling outward, white crew socks and legs clearly visible below the hem, standing on tiptoe, both arms held out to the sides, sparkles around her.

Pose: graceful princess twirl in THREE-QUARTER BACK view on the other side: mostly her BACK visible, her face turned away toward the RIGHT edge and barely visible, hair swirling across her back toward the left side of the image, white lab coat from behind, her SHORT pleated mini skirt (hem well above the knees, same short length as the reference) swirling, white crew socks and legs clearly visible, on tiptoe, arms out, sparkles.

Pose: graceful princess twirl at THREE QUARTERS of the turn: full RIGHT PROFILE view, her nose pointing exactly at the RIGHT edge of the image, on tiptoe, both arms held out front and back like a ballerina, her SHORT pleated mini skirt (hem well above her knees, same short length as the reference) swirling with the spin, white crew socks and legs clearly visible below the hem, long blonde hair streaming behind her toward the left side of the image, serene smile, sparkles.

Pose: graceful princess twirl nearly complete, body rotated so her face is in three-quarter view looking toward the RIGHT side of the image, on tiptoe, arms out gracefully, skirt and coat still flaring, hair swinging around her shoulders, serene closed-eye smile turning into a bright smile, sparkles. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs, do not mirror the character.

Pose: graceful princess twirl finishing: FACING THE VIEWER again, still on tiptoe, arms softly held out, skirt still swirling from momentum, long blonde hair settling around her shoulders, radiant happy smile, sparkles. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs exactly as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the twirl has just ended: FACING THE VIEWER, heels lowering back to the floor, arms floating gracefully down, pleated skirt swaying and settling, hair settling, radiant happy smile with blushing cheeks, sparkles fading. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs, do not mirror the character.

Pose: preparing a princess curtsy, facing the viewer: one foot sliding back behind the other, both hands reaching down and daintily pinching the hem of her pleated skirt at both sides, chin up, gentle elegant smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs, do not mirror the character.

Pose: beginning a princess curtsy, facing the viewer: her feet stay CLOSE TOGETHER with one foot tucked directly behind the other ankle (exactly the same foot position as the previous frame — the feet do NOT move), knees just starting to bend a little, both hands daintily pinching the hem of her SHORT pleated mini skirt and lifting it only slightly outward — the skirt hem stays well above her knees, white crew socks fully visible, head beginning to tilt down gracefully, gentle smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs, do not mirror the character.

Pose: half-way down a princess curtsy, facing the viewer: her feet remain in EXACTLY the same position — close together, one foot tucked directly behind the other ankle, feet planted and unmoving — ONLY her knees are now clearly bent so her body sits lower, both hands still daintily pinching the SHORT mini skirt hem lifted slightly outward (hem stays above the knees, socks visible), head bowing gracefully, soft closed-eye smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs, do not mirror the character.

Pose: a FULL deep princess curtsy, facing the viewer: her feet remain in EXACTLY the same position as the previous frames — close together, one foot tucked directly behind the other ankle, feet planted and unmoving — her knees are folded DEEP so her whole body sits CLEARLY LOWER: her overall silhouette is visibly shorter (about 20% shorter than standing), knees strongly bent beneath the skirt, both hands daintily pinching the SHORT mini skirt hem lifted slightly outward (the skirt stays short, hem above the knees, white socks visible), head gracefully bowed forward, eyes closed, sweet smile, sparkles around her. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs, do not mirror the character.

Pose: holding the deep princess curtsy, facing the viewer: IDENTICAL pose to the previous frame — feet close together with one foot tucked directly behind the other ankle, knees folded DEEP so the whole body sits CLEARLY LOWER (silhouette about 20% shorter than standing), hands pinching the SHORT mini skirt hem lifted slightly (hem above the knees, socks visible), head bowed forward, eyes closed — only difference: blushing sweet smile and extra little sparkles twinkling around her. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs, do not mirror the character.

Pose: rising from the princess curtsy, facing the viewer: her feet still in EXACTLY the same position — close together, one foot tucked behind the other ankle, unmoving — knees straightening halfway so the body rises, head starting to lift with a sweet smile, hands still lightly pinching the SHORT mini skirt hem (hem above the knees, socks visible). The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs, do not mirror the character.

Pose: nearly standing again after the curtsy, facing the viewer: body almost upright, hands releasing the skirt hem, feet coming back together, head up with a bright happy smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs, do not mirror the character.

Pose: standing upright facing the viewer after the curtsy: arms floating back down to her sides, skirt settling, beaming happy smile with blushing cheeks, a few sparkles around her head. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs, do not mirror the character.

Pose: standing tall and relaxed facing the viewer, arms at her sides, skirt fully settled, radiant closed-eye smile with blush, the last sparkles fading — an elegant princess finishing her greeting. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs exactly as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.
